title: War Historian, Repy
description:
An academic is trapped in a [purple]hanging cage[/purple] next to a [gold]treasure chest[/gold].

The academic is muttering about [sine][orange]“One-Time-Use Keys”[/orange][/sine] while furiously writing something.

Looks like you can unlock the [purple]cage[/purple] or the [gold]chest[/gold].

options.title: Unlock the Chest
options.description: Lose [gold]Lantern Key[/gold]. Procure [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Potions[/gold]. Obtain [blue]2[/blue] random [gold]Relics[/gold].

conditions: Currently disabled — IsAllowed() always returns false
notes:
This event is currently [red]disabled[/red] in the game — [red]IsAllowed()[/red] unconditionally returns [red]false[/red] and it will never spawn in a run.

Both options consume all [gold]Lantern Key[/gold] cards in the player's deck via [gold]CompleteQuest[/gold], removing them permanently. The [gold]Lantern Key[/gold] is a Quest card that "Unlocks a special event in the next Act."

Choosing [gold]Unlock the Cage[/gold] sets a persistent run state flag [blue]FreedRepy = true[/blue], which may influence other future events or mechanics. It then grants the [gold]History Course[/gold] relic directly.

Choosing [gold]Unlock the Chest[/gold] opens a reward selection screen offering [blue]2[/blue] random potions and [blue]2[/blue] random relics.
